title: Add user status/role system with admin management

requirements.text: Add a user status/role type to the backend with four possible values: Owner, Admin, User, and Friend
acceptanceCriteria: Backend defines a status type with exactly four variants: Owner, Admin, User, Friend
User profiles in the backend include a status field with a default value

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to change user status/role, including validation that only Admins and Owners can modify status
acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides a method to update a user's status by their principal ID
Only users with Owner or Admin status can call the status change method
Status changes are persisted to the user's profile

requirements.text: Add status management UI to the admin panel with a form to select users and change their status
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel includes a new section for managing user status
Interface allows searching or selecting users by ID
Dropdown or selection interface shows all four status options: Owner, Admin, User, Friend
Success and error messages display when status changes are attempted

requirements.text: Display the current user's status on the Home Screen in a visible location
acceptanceCriteria: Home Screen displays the logged-in user's current status (Owner, Admin, User, or Friend)
Status is shown with clear visual styling to distinguish between different roles
Status display updates when the user's role changes

requirements.text: Create a backend query method to retrieve all users with their status information for display in the admin panel
acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides a method to list all users with their principal ID and status
Method is only accessible to Admin and Owner roles
Returns user data in a format suitable for frontend display

constraints: Preserve existing admin functionality in AdminPanel.tsx and related components
Do not modify authentication or Internet Identity integration
nonGoals: Implementing granular permission systems beyond the four specified statuses
Adding status-based feature access control for existing features
Creating a history or audit log of status changes
